category_sources: source_facts.description says Sylpheed is a simple, lightweight email client.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Sylpheed English site and source_facts.name gives the package name.
docs_sources: Official Sylpheed website provides manual and FAQ pages as documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage and source_facts.source-archive establish the official Sylpheed project, with the matching Sylpheed source repository used as repo.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a simple lightweight email client; source_facts.executables lists the desktop client executable.
